name: Three Herb Pesto
recipeIngredient: 1 cup firmly packed fresh basil leaves
1 cup firmly packed fresh Italian parsley
1 cup firmly packed fresh mint leaves
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, finely chop the garlic.
- Scrape down the sides with a rubber spatula if necessary.
2. Add the herbs, pine nuts, Parmesan, salt, pepper, and olive oil to the blender.
3. Process until smooth.
Pesto will keep stored in an airtight container and refrigerated for up to one week. Pesto can also be frozen and stored for up to one month. Yield: about 1 1/2 cups
